task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.ts` to call `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` and return `code`, `description`, `parameterSchema`, and `model`. Updated the focused edge test to assert the richer response payload, and the edge test file passed. Repo type check passed.

Updated `EffectCreatorPanel` to consume the richer edge-function response, maintain `parameterSchema`, `previewParamValues`, and `generatedDescription` state, load schema/description from `editingEffect`, reset them on form reset, preserve prompt text after generation for iterative editing, save metadata with `generatedDescription` fallback to `prompt.trim()`, and pass schema default params through the widened `onSaved` callback. The panel now renders the generated effect description above preview and `ParameterControls` below preview when schema exists. Repo type check passed.

Updated all three BulkClipPanel effect dropdown handlers to seed `params` with `getDefaultValues()` only when the selected effect is custom, leaving built-in effects unchanged. No `ParameterControls` rendering was added to bulk mode; a grep for `ParameterControls` JSX/call sites in `BulkClipPanel.tsx` returned no matches. Repo type check passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The edge function now returns all four fields: `code`, `description`, `parameterSchema`, and `model`. This is asserted in `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts`, and the focused edge test file passed.

Yes. `EffectCreatorPanel` now stores schema and generated description on generation, loads schema/description from `editingEffect`, resets them through `resetForm`, and saves `generatedDescription` instead of prompt text with a `prompt.trim()` fallback when the generated description is empty. The prompt itself is no longer cleared after generation, preserving iterative editing.

Yes. All three BulkClipPanel effect selectors now add default params for custom effects via `getDefaultValues(schema)`, and there is no `ParameterControls` rendering in bulk mode. A grep for `ParameterControls` JSX/call sites in `src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx` returned no matches.
